title: Hody Shows His Army
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is hody shows his army.
scene: The scene follows hody shows his army, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Shirahoshi, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute, would you?! What are you two saying?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna go to the palace, save my friends...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I am saying that you must not!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously....?! do we really need a fight here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Shark!! Take me to the ryuuguu Palace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh?! his punches damage Luffy's body?!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: The secret of fish-man karate lies in the mastery of water....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Using the power of the water in the atmosphere, it sends powerful waves that impact the water within the opponent's body!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All living beings are filled with water!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even a rubber man cannot escape this truth!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... is this all that your training has achieved?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Robin!!! Get out of the way!!!

summary: Hody Shows His Army. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
